tech_news.title: Instructure confirms data breach, ShinyHunters claims attack - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Educational tech giant Instructure has confirmed that data was stolen in a cyberattack, with the ShinyHunters extortion gang claiming responsibility.

tech_news.title: Leaker claims Dark Souls trilogy remake in development - My Nintendo News
tech_news.description: Shirrako, a leaker with a relatively unknown track record, has stated on X that Bandai Namco is preparing a Dark Souls trilogy remake for undisclosed platforms. A release window was not reported…

tech_news.title: Gemini app getting full redesign that overhauls every part of the UI - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google has been working on a Gemini app redesign for the past few months, and we now have our first look at the full overhaul.

tech_news.title: PS6 Early Info on Cloud Streaming, Machine Learning, and New Horror Game Uncovered - MP1st
tech_news.description: PS6 advanced machine learning, cloud streaming upgrades, and a new horror game in development on Unreal Engine 5 uncovered.

tech_news.title: Valve: 67.74% of Steam users run Windows 11 - Neowin
tech_news.description: Valve has released the latest Steam Hardware & Software Survey data, showing Windows 11's continuous climb among the gaming audience.

tech_news.title: Microsoft Defender wrongly flags DigiCert certs as Trojan:Win32/Cerdigent.A!dha - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Microsoft Defender is detecting legitimate DigiCert root certificates as Trojan:Win32/Cerdigent.A!dha, resulting in widespread false-positive alerts, and in some cases, removing certificates from Windows.

tech_news.title: Modern Warfare 4 Being Playtested on PS4, It’s Claimed - Insider Gaming
tech_news.description: A prominent Call of Duty player on social media has claimed to have heard updates about Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4.
